data.title: Trump announces "Liberation Day" schedule: plans to announce reciprocal tariffs at 4 a.m. Beijing time on April 3
Ethereum researchers propose EIP-7922 to improve the flexibility and efficiency of Ethereum exit queues
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ethereum researcher mikeneuder.eth proposed EIP-7922, which aims to improve the flexibility and efficiency of the Ethereum validator exit queue while ensuring system security. It is reported that Ethereum currently uses a fixed exit limit (about 16 exits) for each epoch. Although it can ensure economic security (control the number of exits and prevent security from decreasing), when the demand for exits surges, validators need to wait for a long time, increasing liquidity risks and funding costs. EIP-7922 proposes to dynamically adjust the exit amount based on the actual exit situation in the near future, replacing the fixed limit. The proposal is currently in the draft stage.

data.title: Before the release of ADP data, the probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in May was 83.5%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CME's "Fed Watch": Before the release of ADP data, the probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in May was 83.5%, and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut was 16.5%. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged by June is 25.1%, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 63.4%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 11.6%.

data.title: Emerging Markets See Rise in Stablecoin Remittances
data.description: According to Foresight News, data released by Artemis indicates that approximately 10% of cross-border remittances in emerging markets are now conducted using stablecoins. India leads with a 9.8% share, followed closely by Nigeria at 9.7% and Mexico at 9.0%. Other countries such as Vietnam, Pakistan, the Philippines, and Egypt have stablecoin remittance rates of 7.8%, 3.7%, 2.3%, and 0.7%, respectively.

data.title: For the first time, Wall Street analysts have suggested that investors sell Strategy, and the market seems to be close to "saturation"
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy)'s aggressive strategy of buying Bitcoin by selling stocks and bonds may have come to an end. Now, for the first time, an analyst on Wall Street has appeared who advises investors to sell. This analyst is Gus Gala of Monness Crespi Hardt, who made this bearish judgment. Just the day before, Strategy disclosed that it spent $1.92 billion between March 24 and March 30 to buy 22,048 Bitcoins (BTCUSD) at an average price of $86,969.
Gala downgraded MicroStrategy's rating from "neutral" to "sell", becoming the only short among the 14 analysts covering the company surveyed by FactSet, and the remaining 13 were long. Gala said his concern is that investors' response to MicroStrategy's recent bond and preferred stock issuance was "not ideal," and these funds were originally planned to be used to buy more Bitcoin. He believes that the market seems to be close to "saturation," which means that MicroStrategy may have higher costs to raise funds to continue buying Bitcoin in the future. (Barrons)

data.title: Trump Media & Technology Group files for additional issuance of 134 million shares of common stock and plans to sell 8.4 million shares
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump Media Technology Group (DJT.O) applied for an additional issuance of 134 million common shares and submitted application documents for the possible sale of 8.4 million shares. Currently, Trump Media Technology Group (DJT.O) has fallen 6% before the market. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitfarms Secures $300 Million Financing Agreement for Pennsylvania Project
data.description: According to Odaily, Nasdaq-listed mining company Bitfarms announced on the X platform that it has reached a preliminary agreement for a $300 million private debt financing with Macquarie Group. This funding is intended to support the initial development of the HPC project at Panther Creek in Pennsylvania. The initial financing amount is set at $50 million, with the maximum withdrawal amount reaching $300 million upon final document signing. Macquarie Group is expected to provide non-dilutive funding for the initial construction of the Panther Creek data center.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Prices Likely to Bottom by June, Analyst Predicts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Nansen's chief research analyst Aurelie Barthere has estimated a 70% likelihood of cryptocurrency prices reaching their lowest point by June. Current data shows Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) are trading at 15% and 22% below their highest prices this year, respectively. These figures suggest that upcoming discussions will serve as significant market indicators. Once the most challenging aspects of tariff negotiations are resolved, there will be a clearer opportunity for cryptocurrencies and risk assets to finally bottom out.
